pi_items.source: verifier.py line 71 hardcodes expected balance; task.json description specifies setting opening balance to exactly $200.00
Floreant POS official documentation confirms 1111 is default PIN/secret key; task_utils.sh line 8 declares FLOREANT_PIN='1111'
Consistent across setup_task.sh line 15, export_result.sh line 19, and Java verification code at line 48

privileged_info_summary: The open_shift task requires an agent to open a new shift in Floreant POS (a real open-source point-of-sale system). The task is synthetic but operates on real software. All metadata values are verified: PIN 1111 is the default authentication credential for Floreant POS back office access; the expected opening balance is exactly $200.00 as confirmed in the verifier code; the database is located at /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server with a SHIFT table containing OPENING_BALANCE column. The agent must navigate to Back Office, enter PIN 1111, open a shift with $200.00 opening balance, and return to the main terminal screen.
